name: tlor-agents
displayName: TLOR Agents — a Middle-earth fellowship for Claude Code
description: Nine pinned subagent roles themed on Middle-earth races: rohirrim-outrider, ranger-pathfinder, noldor-loremaster, dwarf-smith, gondor-builder, eagle-sentinel, and the adversarial panel elf-archer / orc-saboteur / hobbit-gardener. Each role pins model/effort/tools so cost and responsibility are fixed by design.
